flavorText: Dread Captains rule through fear, momentum, and the terrifying certainty that surrender might be the safer choice.

features.description: Raise your presence into something enemies read as immediate danger.
Open fights with menace strong enough to rattle weaker opposition.
Punish frightened, hesitant, or cornered enemies even harder.
Your name itself becomes a battlefield effect.
At peak play, fear and momentum spread outward from you like fire on tar.

dread-captain-black-flag.summary: Project a fear-based battlefield identity from the moment combat starts.

dread-captain-fearsome-boarding.summary: Reward opening with raw intimidation and direct pressure.

dread-captain-crack-their-will.summary: Exploit enemies once they start to hesitate or break.

dread-captain-terrible-repute.summary: Your reputation stops being flavor and starts shaping encounters.

dread-captain-kingmaker-of-panic.summary: Your capstone spreads collapse through enemy lines once you gain momentum.
